title: pule #4439
definition:
1) a gate
    1a) of the larger sort
        1a1) in the wall of either a city
        1a2) a palace
        1a3) a town
        1a4) the temple
        1a5) a prison
 2) the gates of hell (likened to a vast prison)
 3) metaph. the access or entrance into any state
